content.text:
All 7 tests passing.

**Refactored Code Mass for `sumBasePremiums` + helpers**:

```typescript
const isComponent = (item: Item): boolean => COMPONENT_TYPES.has(item.type);
const sumBase = (items: Item[]): number =>
  items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUM[item.type], 0);
const priceComponents = (components: Item[]): number =>
  components.length === BLOCK_SIZE ? BLOCK_PREMIUM : sumBase(components);
const sumBasePremiums = (items: Item[]): number =>
  sumBase(items.filter((item) => !isComponent(item))) +
  priceComponents(items.filter(isComponent));
```

Component Count (combined across the 4 helpers):
- Constants: `0` (in reduce) = 1
- Bindings: `item`, `items`, `sum`, `item`, `components`, `BLOCK_SIZE`, `BLOCK_PREMIUM`, `items`, `item`, `items` = ~10
- Invocations: `has`, `reduce`, `+`, `length === BLOCK_SIZE`, `sumBase`, `filter`, `isComponent`, `!`, `sumBase`, `+`, `priceComponents`, `filter` = ~12
- Conditionals: 1 (ternary)
- Loops: 3 (reduce, filter, filter)
- Assignments: 0

Mass: 1 + 10 + 24 + 4 + 15 + 0 = **54**

**Mass Change**: 63 → 54 (Δ −9)

**Refactoring Applied**:
- Extracted `isComponent` predicate — names the partitioning intent clearly
- Extracted `sumBase` — eliminates duplicated `reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUM[item.type], 0)` (was written twice)
- Extracted `priceComponents` — names the block-discount rule and isolates it
- Introduced named constant `BLOCK_SIZE = 3` — replaces magic number `3` with intention-revealing constant
- Top-level `sumBasePremiums` now reads as the policy: "sum the main items, plus the priced components"

Benefits:
- Removed duplication of the `reduce` summation logic
- Lower APP mass (63 → 54)
- Each helper has a single, named responsibility — easier to extend when new component types or block rules arrive (upcoming tests reference 4-rune, mixed types, two blocks)
- Magic number `3` replaced by `BLOCK_SIZE` named constant

**Tests**: All 7 passing, 19 todo remaining.

Refactoring Complete:
- **Refactoring**: Extracted `isComponent`, `sumBase`, `priceComponents` helpers; introduced `BLOCK_SIZE` constant
- **Mass Change**: 63 → 54 (Δ −9)
- **Tests**: All passing

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-18_11-06-31_claim-office-example-mapping_v6.5.1-orchestration-audited_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`
